channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 1 novas CVEs
• 4 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 The People’s Choice Awards Are Back
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Year over year, the People’s Choice Awards gives the spotlight to sessions that deserve it—and this year, you’re the jury once again. From June 23 to July 10, you get to vote on 15 sessions across four content tracks. The winners will be revealed as of July 21, and will …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/announcing-people-choice-awards/
 
📰 Plan. Filter. Favorite. The Content Catalog Is Live
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Join us at VMware Explore Las Vegas, Nevada | The Venetian Aug. 3, 2026 REGISTER NOW The Content Catalog Awaits Explore starts now—and so does your session strategy. The VMware Explore 2026 Content Catalog is now live, and it’s time to start building your personalized agenda.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/content-catalog-now-live/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

💣 FFmpeg fixes PixelSmash flaw in widely used video decoder
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A newly disclosed FFmpeg flaw dubbed 'PixelSmash' could be exploited for remote code execution on Jellyfin servers under certain conditions, and can also trigger a denial-of-service condition in applications like Kodi, Emby, Nextcloud, PhotoPrism, and OBS Studio.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ffmpeg-fixes-pixelsmash-flaw-in-widely-used-video-decoder/
 
💣 GitHub Updates actions/checkout to Block Common Pwn Request Attack Patterns
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
GitHub is moving to strengthen software supply chain security by updating "actions/checkout" to block pwn request attacks that exploit the risky use of the "pull_request_target workflow" trigger to run malicious code with the workflow's full privileges. Effective June 18, 2026, the latest version of "actions/checkout," the official GitHub action for checking out a repository into the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/github-updates-actionscheckout-to-block.html
 
💣 The Exploit Doesn't Exist. You Can Still Prove It Works Against You
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers can now weaponize newly disclosed vulnerabilities far faster than most organizations can patch them. Picus Security explains how security teams can validate exploitability before a public exploit even exists.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/the-exploit-doesnt-exist-you-can-still-prove-it-works-against-you/
 
📰 LastPass confirms data breach in Klue supply chain attack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
LastPass announced that hackers accessed customer data from its Salesforce environment after stealing the company's OAuth tokens in the Klue supply chain attack earlier this month.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/lastpass-confirms-data-breach-in-klue-supply-chain-attack/
 
📰 Researchers Detail DifyTap Flaws in Dify That Could Expose AI Chats Across Tenants
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of four vulnerabilities in Dify, an open-source agentic workflow platform with more than 146,000 GitHub stars, that could allow attackers to stealthily read artificial intelligence (AI) conversions from other customers' applications without requiring authentication. The vulnerabilities have been collectively codenamed DifyTap by Zafran Security.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/researchers-detail-difytap-flaws-in.html
 
📰 Check Point e Illumio ampliam parceria para conter ataques impulsionados por IA - Inforchannel
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Check Point, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOVjF5QU1jR2lTLWJIN01nMkJXQkdqNWJpZ3BscHNDalhBVXpZQnljbVJfQS1MSXEyWHY5amJ5ZEZRM1RhREZ6OENDc1ZNVEhadC1KWXdleF9jY1YtQXBvY2laRkRLeG5ScHhMX1ZBc21rdEZLaGdYRlNKWkRZbXVRVDVfcDBrb2lOem1yX3NwcERpQ19IbEE0ZVdMY0hhSUJPRDg2TXAtMElXRTZ1ZGhJcHBCY2x6cXNlTFdv?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-12249 - Ubuntu
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
An issue was discovered in Canonical ADSys upstream versions through v0.16.2. During Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS) certificate auto-enrollment via the vendored Samba client script (internal/policies/certificate/python/vendor_samba/gp/gp_cert_auto_enroll_ext.py), ADSys utilizes a plaintext HTTP connection (http://) instead of a secure HTTPS connection (https://) to request the CA certificate from the A...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12249
 
💣 WordPress plugin Gravity SMTP exploited for sensitive information disclosure | brief | SC Media - SC Media
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxQT0FkcUxROEJ0R2I1U1haNXZjcndIMTdveEF3RmZtQXMxWmk5UmIwRHIwWW9VY0pHaVZ4YklFNjZ6bVVKWjlwbkg2aFh4dmtxRXFSQlJKa0VRdEhJMXd3Y090cktMOHh1R21zVEZWVVJUQUc1dzNZM3RwWllqc1diRlBPNE5jcnVSOUJ5MkdDdUpiSmFYZ2RqS1M0dGZTc1ZqNENEVDdpUXVEQQ?oc=5
 
📰 Global law enforcement operation disrupts SocGholish malware, more than 14k WordPress sites remediated - Cyber Daily
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a WordPress, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 OpenAI Launches Patch the Planet To Help Open-Source Teams Find and Fix Bugs Faster - Techgenyz
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTFBQTVlvMjNiWEZBQTlweUxxcE9Hd2RwUnh4TjFmdkYzc0hYMXh0dlVuaW92RERTYy1mSTBGdHpHNXdSVzVhUDdHU0xDZnd4Q2lVemNnUzRIUy1XLUkxZ1JZTmY1UFNLdDlKSG9FQ05fUFNmNUxnZkRKc0N6WHdjdw?oc=5
 
📰 Canonical announces live kernel patching for Arm64
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Canonical Livepatch now officially supports Arm64, further expanding its security patching automation capabilities. For the first time, Ubuntu on an Arm64 machine can apply critical kernel updates, without service interruption or rebooting. Starting with Ubuntu Core 26 for Arm64, and for Ubuntu Core 20 and onwards for AMD64 machines, a wider range of devices and […]
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/canonical-announces-live-kernel-patching-for-arm64
 
📰 Meta Suspends Internal AI Training Programme Amid Privacy Breach - outlookbusiness.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Toyota Industries inova seus processos de pintura com IA industrial do Azure - Microsoft Source
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Azure, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 New Phishing Attack Abuses Outlook and Microsoft 365 Groups Features to Attack Users - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 22/06/2026 e 23/06/2026.
